Name: Git - Pull (HTTPS)
Description: Gets the latest source for a Git repository.

Parameters.Name: GitHttpsUrl
Parameters.Label: Clone URL
Parameters.HelpText: 'https://' URL to the repository that will be cloned from.

Parameters.Name: Username
Parameters.Label: Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username to use when authenticating with the HTTPS server.

Parameters.Name: Password
Parameters.Label: Password
Parameters.HelpText: Password to use when authenticating with the HTTPS server. You should create a sensitive variable in your project variables, and then bind this value.

Parameters.Name: GitHttpsBranchName
Parameters.Label: Branch name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the Git branch to clone
